Source: Power Pages Documentation
URL: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/power-pages/
Fetched: 2026-03-19

# Power Pages Documentation

## Key Capabilities
- External-facing websites with Dataverse
- AI copilot features: form generation, text generation, agent integration
- Design studio, templates, Visual Studio Code CLI
- Liquid templates, Web API, code components

## Security
- Authentication configuration
- Web roles
- Table permissions
- Architecture and security white papers

## Administration
- Portals admin center
- Consumption reports
- Diagnostics and troubleshooting

Last updated: 2025-06-28
